name: PRISM — Community Perspectives
subtitle: See how communities experience the world
description:
PRISM is a geographic community perspective platform that helps you understand how different communities experience the same events.

Open the app and see a live map of the world lit up with community activity. Tap a topic, and instantly see how communities from completely different backgrounds are experiencing the same event.

A perspective from Chicago's South Side sits next to one from Rural Appalachia, next to one from a Somali-Canadian neighborhood in Toronto. Same event. Completely different worlds.

Key Features:
• Live map with real-time community perspectives
• Multi-community viewpoint comparison on the same topic
• Personal social layer within community context
• Discover feed that surfaces viewpoints you've never encountered
• Ghost mode for private browsing
• Community Pulse daily digest
• Cross-community connections

PRISM is not a news aggregator, a debate platform, or a political tool. It's a place where real people from real communities share real perspectives.
keywords: perspectives, community, social, geographic, map, viewpoints, diversity, understanding, local, neighborhoods

descriptions: Live map with glowing community pins
Perspective cards from different communities on the same topic
